_comment: Declarative workflow definition for professional-learning. Creates coaching and PD resources (look-fors, coaching guides, PD session plans) grounded in adult-learning principles and observable teacher practice.
description: Coaching/PD resource: observable practice anchor → reading-level check → quality gate

steps.note: Verify that look-fors and coaching prompts are written at a professional adult reading level

note: Professional-learning is adult-facing and practice-anchored, not standards-anchored. No atom-standards-match needed unless the PL focus is directly tied to a student standard. No evaluative judgment — coaching only.
